title: Journey
description: Represents a customer journey in Marketing Cloud. A journey defines an automated workflow that guides contacts through a series of marketing interactions across channels.

id.description: System-generated unique identifier for the journey

key.description: Customer-defined unique key for the journey

version.description: Current version number of the journey

workflowApiVersion.description: Version of the Journey Builder API used

triggers.description: Entry triggers that inject contacts into the journey

activities.description: Activities that contacts pass through in the journey

goals.description: Goal criteria that measure journey success

exits.description: Exit criteria that remove contacts from the journey
